task_completion.description: Navigate to the Projects workspace in Nuxeo
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface is visible, and the user has navigated to the 'Projects' workspace (e.g., 'Projects' is highlighted in the navigation tree or breadcrumb).

task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'Annual Report 2023' document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document 'Annual Report 2023' is clicked or opened, showing its summary or preview page.

task_completion.description: Open the metadata edit form for the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit' tab or metadata editing form for 'Annual Report 2023' is open, displaying editable fields like Title and Description.

The Description text area contains the text: 'Consolidated annual financial report for fiscal year 2023, including revenue, expenses, and strategic outlook.' (or a text >50 characters containing keywords 'annual', 'financial', 'fiscal', '2023').

task_completion.description: Save the changes and view the updated description
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save button has been clicked, and the document's view/summary page now displays the newly updated description.

integrity.description: Agent used the Nuxeo web GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser interface is used for all actions. No terminal windows with curl, python scripts, or Nuxeo API commands are visible.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Nuxeo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Nuxeo Platform web interface is visible, rather than a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element, DOM editor) are not open to artificially change the displayed description text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document to edit is 'Annual Report 2023' located in the 'Projects' workspace. The expected description is 'Consolidated annual financial report for fiscal year 2023, including revenue, expenses, and strategic outlook.' To be considered correct, the entered description must be longer than 50 characters and contain at least 2 of the following keywords: 'annual', 'financial', 'fiscal', '2023'.
